summary:
All tests passed! ✅

**The needle:** In `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`, the `proxy_pass` directive for `/api/` was pointing to port **`5001`** instead of the correct port **`5000`** where the Flask backend actually listens.

**The fix:** Changed `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` → `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;`
